remarks: Endorsement Schedule includes terrorism disclosure, additional insured designation, waiver of subrogation, inland marine floater, and causes of loss special form. Quantum Realty Management Inc. added as Additional Insured per written contract/agreement/permit for General Liability. Primary and Non-Contributory wording and Per Project Aggregate Limit apply per endorsement schedule. Four business locations listed across OH and PA, all warehouse occupancy. Nature of operations: regional trucking and freight logistics (LTL and FTL), warehousing and distribution across Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Entity type: Corporation.
